title: Locator
scope: Item locator — track where physical items are stored around the household. Find things by location, category, tags, or search, attach photos, and manage the set of storage locations. NOT inventory/shopping (the Lists app) — Locator answers 'where did we put it?'.

specs.title: Track an item
specs.behavior: Creating a located item records what it is and where it is stored, with optional category, tags, and a photo.

specs.title: Get an item
specs.behavior: Getting returns the full details of a located item.

specs.title: List items
specs.behavior: Listing returns tracked items, optionally filtered by location or category.

specs.title: Search items
specs.behavior: Searching matches items by name, description, location, or tags.

specs.title: Update an item
specs.behavior: Updating changes only the supplied fields of a located item.

specs.title: Delete an item
specs.behavior: Deleting permanently removes a located item.

specs.title: List locations
specs.behavior: Listing returns all defined storage locations.

specs.title: Create a location
specs.behavior: Creating defines a new storage location (e.g. Garage, Attic, Storage Shed).
